## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Implement keyboard-accessible command palette (`Ctrl/Cmd + K`)
- Include quick actions for route navigation and common mock tasks
- Add search across screens and actions
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Modal width 640px desktop, full-width mobile sheet
  - Result rows min-height 44px with active/focus states
  - Keyboard navigation via arrows + enter + escape

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Command palette opens and closes correctly
- [ ] Search filters routes/actions in real time
- [ ] Keyboard-only flow works end-to-end
- [ ] PR includes screenshots and short demo GIF

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `ux`, `navigation`, `priority-medium`
